text:
is a single by Shirō Sagisu. The single was published by King Records via its label STARCHILD with the catalog number KICM-155, it was released on 01 August 1997. https://vgmdb.net/album/35698 This single contains the theme song for the The End of Evangelion theatrical film. The jacket illustration was a CG artwork by designer Norihiko Nezu.
